methods.name: extract_wikilinks
methods.description: Extracts all wikilinks from the given input string.  Wikilinks are denoted by the pattern `[[...]]`, where "..." represents the content of the link. This function uses a statically compiled regex to find all occurrences and extracts their inner content.

name: WatcherModule
description: Procedural module class encapsulating free-standing functions inside `src-tauri/src/commands/watcher.rs`.

methods.name: watch_vault
methods.parameters: vault_path: String, handle: AppHandle, state: State<'_, AppState>

methods.name: index_file
methods.parameters: path: &str, modified: i64, size: u64, frontmatter_json: Option<&str>, inline_tags_json: Option<&str>, resolved_links: &[String]
methods.description: Index a file with its metadata and resolved wikilinks.  # Arguments  * `path` - The full path to the source file * `modified` - Unix timestamp of last modification * `size` - File size in bytes * `resolved_links` - Vector of FULL PATHS to target files (already resolved from wikilinks)

methods.name: set_note_tags
methods.description: Replace tags for a file (normalized tags).

methods.name: get_outgoing_links
methods.description: Get all outgoing links from a specific file.  Returns a vector of full paths to files that this file links to.

methods.name: get_backlinks
methods.description: Get all backlinks to a specific file.  Returns a vector of full paths to files that link to this file.

methods.name: get_all_links
methods.description: Get all links in the vault (for graph visualization).  Returns a vector of (source_path, target_path) tuples.

methods.name: update_file_path
methods.description: Update links when a file is renamed/moved.  This updates both: 1. Links FROM this file (update source_path) 2. Links TO this file (update target_path)

methods.name: delete_file
methods.description: Delete a file from the index.  This also removes all outgoing links from this file due to CASCADE constraints.

methods.name: delete_files_by_prefix
methods.description: Delete all files from the index whose path starts with the given prefix.  Useful for removing all notes inside a directory that was trashed.

methods.name: get_orphaned_files
methods.description: Get all orphaned files (files with no incoming or outgoing links).

methods.name: get_broken_links
methods.description: Get broken links (links pointing to non-existent files).  Returns a vector of (source_path, broken_target_path) tuples.

methods.name: get_all_indexed_files
methods.description: Get all indexed file paths with their modified times.  Returns a vector of (path, modified_at) tuples for comparison with filesystem.

methods.name: get_all_search_files
methods.description: Get all indexed search files (markdown and non-markdown).

methods.name: upsert_search_file
methods.description: Upsert search file metadata.

methods.name: delete_search_files
methods.description: Delete search files by paths.

methods.name: update_search_file_path
methods.description: Update search file paths when a file or folder is renamed/moved.

methods.name: batch_delete_files
methods.description: Delete multiple files from the index in a single transaction.  More efficient than calling delete_file multiple times.

methods.name: search_notes_by_tags
methods.parameters: tags: &[String], match_all: bool, limit: u32, offset: u32
methods.description: Search notes by tags.  match_all = true requires all tags, otherwise any tag.

methods.name: get_frontmatter
methods.description: Get frontmatter JSON for a specific file.

methods.name: get_all_tags
methods.description: Get all unique tags from frontmatter metadata and inline tags across all notes.

methods.name: get_files_tags
methods.description: Get all tags for each indexed file

methods.name: get_file_tags
methods.description: Get all tags for a specific indexed file.

methods.name: get_all_property_keys
methods.description: Get all unique property keys from frontmatter metadata across all notes.

methods.name: get_note_projection
methods.description: Read a single note projection for Kuzu sync. Returns (id, title, tags) where id is the note path.

methods.name: get_note_projection_rows
methods.description: Read all note projections for Kuzu full sync. Returns (id, title, tags) where id is the note path.

name: VaultIndexer
description: Vault indexer for syncing database with filesystem.

methods.name: full_sync
methods.description: Perform a full sync of the vault with the database.  This function: 1. Walks the vault directory to find all .md files 2. Compares with the database to find new/modified/deleted files 3. Indexes new and modified files 4. Removes deleted files from the database

methods.description: Collect all files from the filesystem with their modified times.

methods.parameters: db: &Database, vault_path: &str, file_path: &str, file_index: &FileIndex, docs_to_index: &mut Vec<SearchDoc>
methods.description: Index a single file: read content, extract links, update database.

name: LibModule
description: Procedural module class encapsulating free-standing functions inside `src-tauri/src/lib.rs`.

name: MainModule
description: Procedural module class encapsulating free-standing functions inside `src-tauri/src/main.rs`.

name: AppState
description: Represents the application state that contains shared resources such as a file watcher and a database connection.  # Fields  * `watcher` - A thread-safe, optional wrapper around a `RecommendedWatcher` instance. This watcher is typically used for monitoring file system events. It is wrapped in a `Mutex` to ensure safe concurrent access across threads.  * `db` - A thread-safe, optional shared reference to a `Database` instance. The `Database` is wrapped in an `Arc` for shared ownership across threads. Internally, sqlx handles concurrent access through its connection pool.  * `file_index` - Cached FileIndex to resolve links quickly without traversing the FS. * `asset_index` - Cached AssetIndex for media embeds.

name: AppStateModule
description: Procedural module class encapsulating free-standing functions inside `src-tauri/src/models/app_state.rs`.

methods.name: build
methods.description: Build an index from a vault directory

methods.name: resolve
methods.description: Resolve a wikilink target to a full file path. Returns the best match based on Obsidian's resolution rules: 1. If the link contains a path (e.g., "folder/Note"), try to match that structure 2. If multiple files have the same name, prefer the shortest path (closest to root) 3. Return None if no match is found

methods.name: resolve_or_default
methods.description: Resolve a wikilink target, or generate a default path if the target doesn't exist.  If the target can be resolved to an existing file, returns that path. Otherwise, returns a fallback path: `vault_path / target.md`.

methods.name: search
methods.parameters: query: &str, tags: &[String], match_all_tags: bool, limit: usize, offset: usize

name: TrashModule
description: Procedural module class encapsulating free-standing functions inside `src-tauri/src/trash.rs`.

methods.name: generate_trash_name
methods.description: Generates a unique trash name using the current naming format: "<stem-or-dirname> (<parent>) <timestamp>[.<original-ext>]"

methods.name: generate_unique_trash_path
methods.description: Builds a unique destination path inside `.trash`, avoiding name collisions when multiple items resolve to the same trash name.

methods.name: rename_recursively
methods.description: Recursively renames children of a trashed directory with the same timestamp.

methods.name: parse_trash_timestamp
methods.description: Extracts the trailing Unix-milliseconds timestamp from a trash item name. Valid examples: - "Note (Folder) 1740681450123.md" - "Folder (Root) 1740681450123"

methods.name: frontmatter_to_json

methods.name: strip_frontmatter

methods.name: sanitize_string
methods.description: Sanitizes a given string by filtering out any characters that are not alphanumeric or one of the following allowed special characters: space (' '), hyphen ('-'), underscore ('_'), parentheses, or period.  # Parameters - `s`: A `String` input containing the text to be sanitized.  # Returns A new `String` containing only the allowed characters from the input.

methods.name: extract_tags
methods.description: Extract normalized tags from markdown content.  Normalization rules: - strip leading '#' - lowercase - keep '/' for hierarchical tags

name: ValidateModule
description: Procedural module class encapsulating free-standing functions inside `src-tauri/src/utils/validate.rs`.

methods.name: validate_path_in_vault
methods.description: Validates that a given path resolves to a location inside the vault directory. Uses `canonicalize()` to resolve symlinks and `..` components, preventing path traversal attacks (e.g., `../../etc/passwd`).

methods.name: is_hidden_or_special
methods.description: Checks if a path contains hidden or special directories/files (starting with `.`). This covers `.git`, `.trash`, `.obsidian`, etc. in a cross-platform way.
